rolling_30d.summary: Vehicle Funnel traffic declined significantly MoM (-42.8%), dropping to 92,877 sessions, though YoY growth remains robust at +153.1%, indicating strong annual momentum. Engagement Rate improved MoM (+4.0 pp) despite lower session volume, but YoY engagement collapsed (-61.2 pp), suggesting quality degradation year-over-year. Direct traffic dominates at 89.9% of sessions but fell sharply MoM (-44.4%), while YoY direct growth is exceptional (+242.8%), highlighting seasonal or cyclical patterns. Organic Search remains stable MoM (-1.0%) but declined YoY (-32.4%), signaling potential SEO headwinds. YTD 2026 performance is exceptionally strong at 379,248 sessions (+209.5% vs YTD 2025), though March shows deceleration (94,926 sessions) after explosive January–February growth (133,969 and 150,353 respectively). Brand landing pages—Tesla (/tesla: 83.8% engagement), Mercedes-Benz (/mercedes-benz: 75.8%), and BMW (/bmw: 69.2%)—drive high engagement, while maintenance content pages show minimal to no engagement, indicating potential funnel misalignment.

quick_wins.title: Leverage Tesla Landing Page Momentum
quick_wins.detail: The /tesla page achieves 83.8% engagement rate (98 engaged of 117 sessions) and remains a strong performer despite MoM decline (-31.6%). Amplifying promotion of this page or replicating its design/messaging on other brand pages could boost overall funnel quality.

quick_wins.title: Capitalize on Homepage Improvement
quick_wins.detail: The homepage (/) grew MoM (+10.3%) to 1,494 sessions with 67.0% engagement rate, bucking the traffic downturn. Strengthening CTA placement and conversion pathways here could convert more of these engaged visitors into higher-value events.

quick_wins.title: Monitor Referral Channel Growth
quick_wins.detail: Referral traffic grew MoM (+11.7%) to 191 sessions, the only growth-positive channel. Identifying and nurturing these referral sources could provide a stable, high-intent traffic lever.

potential_warnings.title: Severe MoM Traffic Contraction
potential_warnings.detail: Sessions dropped 42.8% MoM to 92,877, with Direct traffic falling 44.4%; Engaged Sessions declined 14.9% to 11,300. This sharp downturn requires immediate investigation into campaign pauses, seasonal factors, or technical issues that may have impacted visibility or user access.

potential_warnings.title: Engagement Collapse YoY Despite Rate Improvement
potential_warnings.detail: Engaged Sessions fell 58.1% YoY while Engagement Rate paradoxically rose 4.0 pp MoM but dropped 61.2 pp YoY, indicating that fewer, lower-quality sessions are skewing the percentage metric. The absolute engagement loss is the true concern and suggests content or user intent misalignment year-over-year.

potential_warnings.title: Maintenance Content Pages Driving No Conversions
potential_warnings.detail: Multiple maintenance-focused landing pages (/ford/taurus/2016/maintenance, /lincoln/mkz/2018/maintenance/batteries) show 0% or near-0% engagement (0–12% rates). These pages may be attracting off-funnel traffic or lack clear CTAs, representing wasted impressions and budget.

potential_warnings.title: Organic Search Decline YoY
potential_warnings.detail: Organic Search fell 32.4% YoY to 8,396 sessions despite MoM stability (-1.0%). This suggests SEO rankings or visibility have deteriorated significantly over 12 months, requiring urgent SEO audit and content optimization.

potential_warnings.title: Unassigned Traffic Spike
potential_warnings.detail: Unassigned sessions jumped 1520.3% YoY to 1,199, suggesting significant tracking or attribution gaps. This obscures true channel performance and prevents accurate budget allocation decisions.

biggest_opportunities.title: Revamp or Pause Maintenance Content Pages
biggest_opportunities.detail: Pages like /ford/taurus/2016/maintenance (0% engagement) and /lincoln/mkz/2018/maintenance/batteries (12% engagement) are not converting. Consolidate, optimize with stronger CTAs to mainsite_clicks or calls, or remove to reduce funnel noise and improve site quality metrics.

biggest_opportunities.title: Recover Organic Search Traffic
biggest_opportunities.detail: Organic Search declined 32.4% YoY but remains 9.0% of total traffic (8,396 sessions). Conduct comprehensive SEO audit, refresh high-intent keywords (e.g., brand + model + maintenance), and optimize top-performing pages (Tesla, BMW, Mercedes) to recapture organic visibility and reduce Direct dependency.

biggest_opportunities.title: Expand Brand Landing Page Strategy
biggest_opportunities.detail: Tesla (/tesla: 83.8%), Mercedes-Benz, and BMW pages show exceptionally high engagement but represent only ~2% of traffic. Create similar optimized brand/model landing pages and promote via Direct and paid channels to drive volume to proven converters.

biggest_opportunities.title: Investigate and Fix Attribution Gaps
biggest_opportunities.detail: Unassigned traffic (1,199 sessions) surged 1520.3% YoY, obscuring true channel attribution. Audit GA4 tracking code, UTM parameters, and cross-domain settings to correctly categorize this traffic and reclaim actionable channel-level insights.

biggest_opportunities.title: Implement High-Value Conversion Events
biggest_opportunities.detail: No custom events (calls, book_now, mainsite_clicks) are currently tracked, despite glossary expectations. Set up event tracking for phone calls, appointment scheduling, and main-site navigation to measure true funnel conversion and optimize for revenue-generating actions.

last_calendar_month.summary: Vehicle Funnel experienced a significant MoM traffic decline of -36.9% in March 2026 (94,926 sessions), reversing the strong momentum from January and February, though YoY growth remains robust at +147.3% versus March 2025. Direct traffic dominates at 90.6% of sessions but contracted -38.2% MoM, suggesting seasonal softness or potential tracking/attribution issues given the +233.3% YoY expansion. Engagement Rate improved +4.3 pp MoM to 12.5%, but absolute engaged sessions fell -3.4% MoM and -58.2% YoY, indicating lower-quality traffic mix despite better proportional engagement. YTD 2026 stands at 379,248 sessions (+209.5% vs YTD 2025), but the month-to-month deceleration (Jan: +177%, Feb: +319%, Mar: +147%) signals a plateau. No custom conversion events (calls, bookings, mainsite_clicks) were recorded in this reporting period, which represents a critical data gap for funnel evaluation.

quick_wins.title: Tesla Landing Page Outperformance
quick_wins.detail: /tesla maintains strong engagement at 82.3% despite -28.7% MoM traffic decline, with 98 engaged sessions. Double down on Tesla-specific messaging and retargeting to stabilize this high-intent segment.

quick_wins.title: Homepage Engagement Lift MoM
quick_wins.detail: / homepage reversed downward trend with +25.6% MoM sessions and 66.8% engagement rate (1,040 engaged), recovering from -91.9% YoY decline. Consider homepage optimization as a template for other landing pages.

quick_wins.title: Organic Search Resilience
quick_wins.detail: Organic Search grew +8.0% MoM to 8,564 sessions (9% of traffic), one of the few bright spots amid direct traffic collapse. Prioritize SEO investment to offset direct channel volatility.

potential_warnings.title: Direct Traffic Collapse & Tracking Risk
potential_warnings.detail: Direct traffic fell -38.2% MoM (86,012 sessions, 90.6% of mix) and dominates the funnel unsustainably. The simultaneous +233.3% YoY growth raises red flags for potential attribution model changes or tracking misconfiguration; audit UTM parameters and source/medium assignments immediately.

potential_warnings.title: Absence of High-Value Conversion Events
potential_warnings.detail: Zero custom events logged for calls, book_now, schedule_, mainsite_clicks, or store_locate in March 2026. This is either an implementation gap or indicates failed downstream conversions, making ROI assessment impossible and suggesting urgent GA4 event tracking or funnel completion failures.

potential_warnings.title: Overall Traffic Deceleration & Engagement Erosion YoY
potential_warnings.detail: Engaged Sessions declined -58.2% YoY despite +147.3% traffic growth, and Engagement Rate fell -61.5 pp YoY, pointing to volume-driven but low-quality traffic growth. The monthly trend (Jan→Feb→Mar) shows diminishing returns, suggesting campaign fatigue or audience saturation.

potential_warnings.title: Maintenance Content Underperforms Conversion
potential_warnings.detail: Maintenance-focused pages (/ford/taurus/2016/maintenance, /chevrolet/colorado/2015/maintenance) show zero or very low engagement (0–27.3%), indicating misaligned intent. These pages may be cannibalizing top-of-funnel traffic without driving downstream value.

biggest_opportunities.title: Implement & Validate Conversion Event Tracking
biggest_opportunities.detail: Immediately restore or implement GA4 event logging for calls, booking/scheduling, and mainsite_clicks—the highest-value user actions per the event glossary. Without these, the entire funnel is invisible and optimization is impossible.

biggest_opportunities.title: Investigate & Stabilize Direct Traffic Attribution
biggest_opportunities.detail: Direct traffic's -38.2% MoM plunge contradicts the +233.3% YoY growth; audit GA4 cross-domain tracking, mobile app-to-web flows, and any recent analytics config changes. If legitimate, pivot budget to Organic Search (+8% MoM growth) to build sustainable owned channels.

biggest_opportunities.title: Expand Brand/Model Landing Pages
biggest_opportunities.detail: Tesla (/tesla, 82.3% engagement), BMW (/bmw, 68.4%), and Mercedes (/mercedes-benz, 72.7%) show strong engagement; create dedicated landing pages for Ford, Chevrolet, Volvo, and other high-volume marques to replicate this performance and segment intent.

biggest_opportunities.title: Audit Maintenance Content ROI & Funnel Path
biggest_opportunities.detail: Maintenance pages drive negligible engagement (<27% except Spark); determine if they support top-of-funnel awareness or are dead-end pages. If low-value, consolidate or redirect to model-specific pages (/tesla, /bmw) to streamline the funnel.
